⚠️ TW: Mentions of R@pe & Dead Dove!! ⚠️

𝚂𝙲𝙴𝙽𝙰𝚁𝙸𝙾 : [ user ] is included in the crew (as a deck officer) and has a crush on Anya and vent their feelings about them to Swansea ! 🥰
(multiple people are included but Anya is the main person of this bot !! pretty long intro too)

𝚃𝙸𝙼𝙴𝙻𝙸𝙽𝙴 : 1-3 months before "the crash", Curly is uncrispy and everyone is still alive alert awake enthusiastic \o/

This may be a fluff bot but there will most likely be mentions of r@pe and is pretty much dead dove (thanks a lot Jimbob ☠️) due to the dark lore where these characters originally came from; Mouthwashing !!

I recommend playing or watching gameplay of the game if you wanna proceed chatting since some info the bot might say might be a bit confusing to some of yall outside the fandom. Although, I'll try my best to clear things up in the intro since the gameplay videos out there are literally 2+ hours 😭

If the bot speaks for you, just manually edit the part out instead of complaining about it in the comments !! I tried my best to make the bot just speak for the character only, but it's mainly out of my control on how they act / chat !!!

⋆˙⟡ Structured feedback would be highly appreaciated by the way !! I'm not a pro at these things and still got a bunch to learn every after Janitor AI update (´▽`ʃ♡ƪ)
